# opnsense_quagga_rip (Resource)

Manages RIP routing configuration on OPNsense (FRR). Singleton resource. Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `default_metric` (Number) Default metric for redistributed routes (1-16, 0 = unset).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable RIP. Defaults to `false`.
- `networks` (Set of String) Networks (CIDR) to enable RIP on.
- `redistribute` (Set of String) Route sources to redistribute: `bgp`, `connected`, `kernel`, `ospf`, `static`.
- `version` (Number) RIP version (1 or 2). Defaults to `2`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier (always `rip`).
